description: A perfect casual footwear for the man of style, this floater from lee cooper is crafted from a combination of leathers to offer exemplary comfort. Upper Leather straps criss-crossing across the midfoot and back foot, with a velcro closure at the lateral ankle to offer a snug, customised Fit Straps have a padded fabric inner lining with mesh along the ends of the forefoot straps to offer abrasion-free and sweat-free comfort Suede lined padded footbed ergonomically raised to offer a massage feel Outsole TPR outsole with strategically placed textured waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and traction Flex grooves for ease of movement Curved midfoot for ergonomic comfort Sandal care Wipe away dust with a clean and dry cloth Use a branded leather conditioner when needed Dust the footbed using a suede brush Do not store in direct sunlight
